Custom Wall Decals

Professional Vinyl Wall Graphics for Business, Office & Interior Design

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Custom Wall Decal Designer Upload Your Artwork Select Size & Material Choose Cut Option Preview & Order Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Wall Decals?

Wall decals are adhesive vinyl graphics designed to be applied directly to interior walls, windows, and smooth surfaces. Made from high-quality vinyl material, these custom graphics provide an affordable way to transform office spaces, retail environments, and commercial interiors with professional branding, decorative elements, or informational displays.

Our wall decals use removable adhesive backing that allows for clean removal without damaging painted surfaces. Available in multiple custom decal cutting options including die-cut, kiss-cut, and transfer-cut formats, wall decals can accommodate everything from simple text and logos to complex multi-color designs and large-scale graphics.

Common applications include lobby displays, directional signage, promotional graphics, decorative accents, and temporary event graphics. The vinyl material is designed for indoor use and provides excellent print quality with vibrant colors and sharp detail reproduction.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Wall Decal Order Process

Ordering wall decals through our streamlined process ensures you receive exactly what you need for your space. Our system supports both custom design creation and professional artwork upload to accommodate different project requirements.

Design Methods

Choose between our online design tool for simple graphics or upload professional artwork files for complex wall decal projects. Our design interface includes clipart libraries, text tools, and sizing options to help create effective wall graphics. For uploaded files, we recommend vector formats to ensure optimal print quality and scaling flexibility.

Payment

All wall decals require full payment before production begins. We accept major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. Check payments are also accepted and must be received before your wall decal order enters production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your wall decal order, you'll receive a unique tracking number via email that provides real-time updates throughout the entire production process. Our Live Order Tracking system shows your order status from initial processing through final shipment, giving you complete visibility into your wall decal production timeline.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Wall Decal Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production scheduling allows you to choose the timeline that best fits your wall decal installation needs. Production time begins after artwork approval and payment confirmation, not including shipping time to your location.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Priority production provides the fastest turnaround for urgent wall decal projects. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day production may be available - contact customer service to confirm availability for your specific wall decal requirements.

2 Business Day Express Production

Express production offers rapid turnaround while providing additional time for quality control on your wall decals. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day. This timeline works well for most business installation schedules.

3 Business Day Standard Production

Standard production is our most popular option, providing excellent turnaround speed at no additional cost for wall decal orders. This timeline allows sufficient production time for quality control while meeting most project deadlines. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day.

5 Business Day Saver Production

Saver production offers cost savings for wall decal projects with flexible deadlines. This option provides the same quality and attention to detail while offering budget advantages for larger orders or non-urgent installations.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Wall Decal Cut Options

Understanding the differences between die-cut, kiss-cut, and transfer-cut wall decals helps you choose the best option for your installation requirements and design preferences.

Die-Cut Wall Decals

Die-cut wall decals are cut completely through both the vinyl material and paper backing, creating individually separated pieces that follow your design's exact contour. Like using a cookie cutter, this method produces wall decals with no excess material around the edges. Die-cut decals work best for simple shapes and designs where easy individual placement is preferred. Back slit options are available for standard and permanent adhesive materials.

Kiss-Cut Wall Decals

Kiss-cut wall decals are cut through the vinyl layer only, leaving the paper backing intact around your design. This creates a border of backing material around each wall decal, making removal from the backing sheet easier during installation. Kiss-cut is ideal for detailed designs or when you need the stability of backing material during application.

Transfer-Cut Wall Decals

Transfer-cut wall decals involve cutting the vinyl to your specifications, then removing unwanted vinyl material and applying transfer tape over the remaining design elements. This method is perfect for text-based wall graphics, logos with multiple components, or designs requiring precise multi-piece alignment. Transfer tape holds all elements in position during installation, then removes cleanly after application. Vector artwork files are required for transfer-cut wall decals.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Wall Decal Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork preparation ensures your wall decals print with optimal quality and install correctly. Our prepress team reviews all files before production to identify potential issues and recommend improvements when needed.

Preferred File Types

Vector files provide the best quality for wall decal production, especially when scaling to large sizes. Adobe Illustrator EPS files and PDF formats are preferred because they maintain crisp edges and smooth curves at any size. When submitting vector files, convert all fonts to outlines to prevent font substitution issues.

Additional File Formats

High-resolution raster files are acceptable for photographic wall decals or complex artwork. JPG, TIFF, and PNG files should be sized proportionally to your final wall decal dimensions with sufficient resolution for clear printing. Maximum file size accepted is 100 MB through our upload system.

File Setup Tips

Set up artwork files at the exact proportional size of your wall decal order to ensure proper scaling and placement. Convert all text to outlines or curves, allow for bleed only when necessary, and clearly indicate cut lines for all wall decal products. Avoid flattening or merging layers in PSD files to maintain editing flexibility.

Transfer Cut Guidelines

Transfer-cut wall decals require vector artwork with specific design considerations. All text must be at least 1/2" tall with 1/8" minimum spacing between characters and design elements. Line weights and main design strokes should be minimum 1/8" thick. Simple, open fonts work best for readability and production efficiency.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Wall Decal Shipping Information

Understanding shipping timelines and methods helps you plan your wall decal installation schedule effectively. Shipping time is separate from production time and begins after your order completes manufacturing.

Shipping Methods

We offer multiple shipping options to meet different timeline and budget requirements for wall decal delivery. Economy shipping provides cost-effective delivery for non-urgent orders, while expedited options ensure faster arrival for time-sensitive installations. All shipments include tracking information for delivery monitoring.

Shipping Time Expectations

Shipping times vary by destination and selected method, typically ranging from 1-7 business days after your wall decals ship from our facility. Ground shipping works well for most orders, while overnight and 2-day options accommodate urgent installation schedules. Large wall decal orders may require special handling or freight shipping.

Important Shipping Notes

Wall decals ship in protective tubes or flat packaging depending on size and quantity. Orders containing multiple wall decal products may ship separately based on production completion times. International shipping is available with additional transit time and customs considerations. Contact customer service for specific international wall decal shipping requirements.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Wall Decal Installation Instructions

Proper installation technique ensures your wall decals adhere correctly and maintain their appearance throughout their intended lifespan. Following these steps helps achieve professional-looking results for any wall decal project.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the installation surface thoroughly with mild soap and water, then dry completely before applying wall decals. Remove any dust, oil, or residue that could interfere with adhesion. Ensure the surface is smooth and at room temperature for optimal adhesive performance. Textured or freshly painted walls may require additional preparation time.

Applying the Wall Decal

Position your wall decal carefully before removing the backing, as repositioning may reduce adhesive strength. For large wall decals, work from one edge to the other, smoothing as you go to prevent air bubbles. Use a squeegee or application tool to ensure complete contact between the decal and wall surface.

Removing Transfer Tape

For transfer-cut wall decals, remove the transfer tape slowly at a 45-degree angle after application. If any vinyl lifts with the transfer tape, press it back down and continue removal more slowly. The vinyl should remain adhered to the wall while the transfer tape peels away cleanly.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design Your Custom Wall Decals Today

Transform your space with professional wall decals designed specifically for your needs. Our online design tools and expert production team make it easy to create impactful wall graphics that enhance your environment and communicate your message effectively.

Whether you need simple text decals for office directories, complex branded graphics for retail spaces, or decorative elements for interior design projects, our wall decal solutions provide the quality and durability you need. With fast turnaround times and multiple customization options, you can have professional wall graphics installed quickly and affordably.

Start your wall decal project by selecting your preferred size, material, and cut option, then upload your artwork or use our design tools to create something unique. Our customer service team is available to help with technical questions, artwork optimization, or installation guidance throughout your project.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Wall Decal FAQs

What surfaces work best for wall decals?

Wall decals adhere best to smooth, clean surfaces like painted drywall, glass, metal, and laminated surfaces. Textured walls, brick, or heavily textured paint may not provide adequate adhesion for reliable installation and removal.

How long do wall decals last indoors?

Indoor wall decals typically last 3-5 years when properly installed on appropriate surfaces. Actual lifespan depends on environmental conditions, surface preparation, and adhesive type selected for your specific application.

Can wall decals be removed without damaging paint?

Yes, wall decals are designed for clean removal from most painted surfaces when removed properly. Peel slowly at room temperature, and use heat from a hair dryer if adhesive resistance occurs during removal.

What file format works best for wall decal artwork?

Vector files like Adobe Illustrator EPS or PDF formats provide the best quality for wall decals, especially larger sizes. These formats maintain crisp edges and can be scaled to any size without quality loss.

How large can wall decals be made?

Wall decals can be produced up to 54" wide in a single piece, with virtually unlimited length. Larger graphics can be created using multiple panels that align during installation to create seamless wall coverage.

What is the difference between removable and permanent wall decals?

Removable wall decals use adhesive designed for clean removal within 2-3 years, making them ideal for temporary applications. Permanent decals use stronger adhesive for long-term installations but may be more difficult to remove.
